item.title: Carrie Fisher (RIP) giving Lucas shit
item.description: It's not easy to be a Princess for millions of nerds to fantasize about. Carrie should have given George TONS of crap for it before she passed from this life. Oh wait. She DID!! I hope you smile or crack a mental smirk today, from this or an unrelated thing - even if only a brief moment. Cheers!!
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.title: Every morning and night I seen my adult kids memes, dad jokes, daily jams, warnings about cats, etc. Today my youngest completed hoods day of college. Hooray!!
item.dc:creator: Wheretheheckisjason

item.title: America Memes Vol 4
item.description: I'm picking back up where I left off clearing out some of the memes I spent a frankly absurd amount of time organizing into folders on my phone. As always, I Hope you all enjoyed. I used to post all of the links to my past posts below but the ends of these posts were getting a bit unwieldy. So, at the risk of overcomplicating things I've made a few (sometimes pretty loosely) categorized repositories of my past posts if you'd like to see more I'll link to those below. Movies, TV, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/qWQKZr5 Books, Comics, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/0unBaDX Gaming, Tech, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/17tib1E Food, Family, and Animals https://imgur.com/gallery/zlsjOQa Work, Politics and America https://imgur.com/gallery/zQrWXQE ADHD, Autism, Mental Health, and Millenial https://imgur.com/gallery/G1E6yWd NSFW Memes https://imgur.com/gallery/2I9HXEp Reactions https://imgur.com/gallery/uDjMX0P

item.title: Some good news: Onyx is thriving!
item.description:
Jene sent me some videos of my god-kitten Onyx. He’s doing so well!
He is eating like a champ
And he’s also very snuggly. Look at that face!
Oh my god and his purrs!! We’re taking him back to the vet next Friday to hear what the board-certified radiologist has to say about his X-rays and figure out the next steps. I’ll be sure to update!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.82 A THOUSAND CUTS

ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Thanks Ms Panda - Fauxe YouTube: https://youtu.be/l86cXyklZxQ?si=ZN-_65KLWOjaZC4b Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/7AymSDcECfA5rPYAydjgBX?si=40b55d82789f445e

Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos

item.title: While out fishing with his family, This man noticed an eagle circling above their boat. Realizing it was eyeing the fish he had just caught, he tossed it into the air and the eagle swooped down gracefully to snatch it mid flight.

item.title: Seeing all of Trump's shady behavior written down in one place is pretty jarring.
item.description: Wake up, MAGA. He never cared about you or your family's interests. He's in power to break our government so that it can be rebuilt to further favor corporations and the rich. That's it. That's the plan. So, I dont want to hear about your patriotism when this is over and done. You're part of the problem and the sooner you realize that the better off we will ALL be.
item.dc:creator: Johje19

item.title: A photo of my dog Panko every day
item.description: My worse nightmare I cut one of Panko’s nail a tiny bit too short. ;____; he didn’t even react but bled at lot. Stopped after a few minutes. Luckily got one of the clippers with a guard so doesn’t take off too much at a time. Also bought a nail grinder but a bit difficult with his hairy grinch feet. Photo clearly shows how bothered he is haha.
item.dc:creator: PankoBoy

item.title: Cops are trash
item.description: "After conferring amongst themselves about whether or not to charge Callaghan with DUI, Fenske and Whitehall, accepting that he was diabetic, “began to brainstorm other charges they might arrest him for,” the lawsuit says. “Work the DUI, the child endangerment, and the pursuit, all that aspect,” Fenske directed Whitehall."
item.dc:creator: CrimsonPermanentAssurance

item.title: cat and owl
item.description: might wanna mute
item.dc:creator: ManoloBIahnik

item.title: Movie Details :)
item.description:
In Dune Part Two (2024) I would fall for the whole Lisan Al Gaib thing because I’d believe anything Rebecca Ferguson says tells me. This is a reference to me having a major crush on Rebecca Ferguson and also being easily manipulated
In The Rise of Skywalker (2019), Rey buries Luke and Leia’s lightsabers at the Lars Homestead on Tatooine, even though Luke didn’t like it there, and Leia never set foot there. This is to show that writer/director JJ Abrams is too enamored with the 1977 Star Wars film and nostalgic references.
In Interstellar (2014), Casey Affleck plays the under appreciated brother who lives in his sibling’s shadow. It is still unclear where he drew inspiration from to achieve his performance.
In Avengers (2012), the all-powerful infinity stone has no effect on Tony because there's a piece of metal in the way. One of the most powerful objects in the universe is rendered useless if you just wear a bulletproof vest or something. Why did Loki want this? Is he stupid?
Despite not allowing his employees to work remotely, Lex Luthor of Superman (2025) is shown proactively leading his workers at the office. He may be a grade A dick, but he's at least an extremely attentive boss.
In Superman (2025), the Prime Minister of Boravia died looking like this. This is, of course, a reference to how I would look like if Hawkgirl topped me midair.
In Deadpool & Wolverine (2024), the main antagonist lives in the skull of dead Antman's corpse rotting in the Void. This was to signify that Antman franchise was dead, but not buried, enabling Disney to abuse the corpse of another Marvel character in the same movie.
In Weapons (2025), the teacher traded the kids for a gallon of PCP.
Shakespeare would agree
In The Breakfast Club, We're supposed to believe that this girl is ugly.
In Interstellar (2014) the physicist shows absolutely no emotions when finally meeting his colleagues after waiting alone for 23 years on an isolated spaceship like it’s a common thing to do
I'm glad Marvel chose to have Alan Cumming come back as Nightcrawler. Jake Gyllenhaal's version was just confusing.
In Dexter (2006), the psychopathic serial killer who hates sex eventually learns to like it as he "becomes more human". This is a metaphor for how asexual people are not considered human beings
In Blade: Trinity (2004), Jessica Biel's character wears earbuds so she can listen to music while fighting vampires, thus removing one of the key senses for awareness while fighting supernatural stealth monsters. What the hell is wrong with her!?
Gal Gadot has her last name due to the fact that the world is still waiting for her acting skills to arrive
In Troy (2004) allegiances would remain forged and countless lives would have been spared if Orlando Bloom wasn't horny.
In Daredevil Born Again (s01e05), Matt tells an Irish bank robber he doesn't know what part of Ireland his ancestors are from. This is a reference to how this is bullshit, and every Irish American knows exactly where their ancestors came from and will take any opportunity to talk about it.
In Rise of Skywalker(2019) Rey isn't actually Palpatine's granddaughter since her dad is a fucked up clone experiment with only some of Palpatine's DNA. This is not explained in the movie at all. This is because nobody who helped make this movie had any fucking idea what they were doing.
Hawk Girl Tax.
item.dc:creator: Luvlyquants

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1444 (tea vampires)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
I dreamed there was a ceasefire and then Putin died and Russia was in civil war and I was there on vacation when the Civil War happened with some people I knew from church and I was PISSED because all I wanted to do was go birding, and they were stealing icons from museums to "protect" them from the "communist rebels." So I went out on my own and got pulled over by a scary Russian cop who turned out to be a border and we shared sandwiches while watching cool Eurasian ducks out on the shores of the Black Sea through his police spotting scope. I don't even try to figure out what my brain is trying to tell me anymore.
Less witchcraft, more capitalism has failed, but yeah, whatever.
This SUCKS SO BAD in a multi-player game.
Maybe the microplastics made me think of birding in Russia during a Civil War.
...this hurt.
Wave? I guess?
If a woman messaged me something like either of these I would immediately drop everything and say "where and when"
So. I think I finally have good news.
I went for an interview at this youth center that specializes in super traumatized kids and teens for being a youth care technician yesterday.
One of the things I had been thinking about a lot in all this job hunting rigamarole is that it would be nice to have a job where I'm making at least a little corner of the world a bit better.
And so many have messaged me in the last months to keep my chin up and hold on because apparently my meme dumps were one of the few good things in their lives. Thought it would be nice to maybe expand on that idea.
So I'd been applying to some jobs like that lately.
You can't go to the Nautilus party.
Anyway, the interview went well, decided to sit on the mountain afterwards for a cigar and read bird omens.
Heard something funny, yet familiar, like a finchy Warbler or a warblery-sounding finch.
Decided to turn on Merlin, and it said Painted Redstart, and I'm like ?
Now, mountains and habitat like this, farther south and east in Arizona, I would have been far less skeptical. But I've been trying to find a Painted Redstart in proper habitat in the Verde Valley (both on Mingus Mountain and on the other side near Sedona) for almost 6 years now, and no dice.
But then I saw a tiny black and white bird fly into a nearby tree into my binoculars and I thought that was it but then it moved, i couldn't get my camera on it, and every other warbler-type thing in the tree was some sort of yellow-hued Warbler. Knowing the habitat was bad up there for Yellow Warbler specifically, my gut instinct was Wilson's Warbler.
Now, if you've never met a Wilson's Warbler before, males and females are both yellow with green sports jackets and tails, and the males have a tiny dapper black crown like a yarmulke. They're one of my top favorite Warblers.
Looking at the photos later, I saw it was correct in my identification. A good Warbler omen, really. But I couldn't relocate the supposed Painted Redstart. I waited another 10 minutes in the silence of the post-noon woods, with the only sounds being the distant monsoon thunder and the wind through the pines. Nothing seemed to be around, so I decided to walk back to the car.
Oops, meant to save this for a Bronze-age dump.
Anyway, as I walk towards the car, I hear it again, and see on a scrawny gambel oak sapling, dancing around doing it's red/whitestart thing, and raise my binoculars. Sure enough, juvenile Painted Redstart. Hoooly shit. Awesome. Something I've been looking for around here for years. Phone rings as I'm bringing camera up.
It's the clinic with a job offer. Hell yes. Starts September 1st.
By then, the Redstart was farther away, and i could only get REALLY BAD pictures, but you can tell what it is, at least.
This gives me a bit of time for a mini-vacation. I have time, and i can use the money left over from the car. I mean, my first thought was to get the sword, but... that seems like a good reward for a first few paychecks.
So yeah, I'm going to Pando just before I begin work.
Now, my anxiety makes me wonder whether something bad will happen to me to balance things out again.
You all know you want to hug the giant penguin.
The video about this is well worth watching.
But it is a beautiful country.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "You're a good boy.i love you too" Today's message from Baja: "What are you doin? What are you doin? What are you doin? [Laughter]" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.dc:creator: countervail247365
